final:
module AES_AddRoundKey(  
    input wire reset,  
    input wire rst,  
    input wire [127:0] state_in,  
    input wire [127:0] round_key,  
    output reg [127:0] state_out  
);  
    always @(posedge reset or posedge rst) begin  
        if (rst) begin  
            state_out <= 128'b0;  
        end else begin  
            state_out <= state_in ^ round_key;  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
